description: Leads that should be CALLED but never cold-emailed during any active sprint. Loaded by send_emails.py (CALL_ONLY_LEADS) and scripts/build_today_calls.py (CALL_ONLY_OVERRIDES). The segments map is intentionally named so additional warm groups (partner_warm, channel_partnership, etc.) can be added without code changes.

partner_warm.label: Strategic partner warm angle
partner_warm.reason: Existing partnership with this account. Cold email would damage the relationship framing. Use partnership-framing language on calls; route any inbound interest through existing contacts rather than a standard pitch.
